title: Help Desk - Overview of Service-Based Deactivation
body: Departing Faculty and Staff Departing faculty and staff lose access to the following: Box G Suite Microsoft 365 Qualtrics Zoom Emeriti Emeriti continue to have normal access to the following: Box G Suite Qualtrics Emeriti continue to have access to limited services in the following: Microsoft 365 Emeriti lose access to the following: Zoom Former Students Former students lose access to the following: Box G Suite Microsoft 365 Qualtrics Zoom Retirees With IT Services Retirees with IT services continue to have normal access to the following: Box G Suite Qualtrics Retirees with IT services continue to have access to limited services in the following: Microsoft 365 Retirees with IT services lose access to the following: Zoom Retirees Without IT Services Retirees without IT services lose access to the following: Box G Suite Microsoft 365 Qualtrics Zoom See Also Leaving the University of Wisconsin-Madison - Access to IT Services Help Desk - Deactivation Timeline for Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Zoom, Box, Qualtrics Help Desk - Resources for Microsoft 365, Google, Zoom, Box, and Qualtrics Account Changes or Deactivations Microsoft 365 - Reduced access to services due to an affiliation change Next: Help Desk - Resources for Microsoft 365, Google, Zoom, Box, and Qualtrics Account Changes or Deactivations »
